고린도후서 1:1.content: Paul, an apostle of Christ Jesus through the will of God, and Timothy our brother, to the assembly of God which is at Corinth, with all the saints who are in the whole of Achaia:

고린도후서 1:2.content: Grace to you and peace from God our Father and the Lord Jesus Christ.

고린도후서 1:3.content: Blessed be the God and Father of our Lord Jesus Christ, the Father of mercies and God of all comfort;

고린도후서 1:4.content: who comforts us in all our affliction, that we may be able to comfort those who are in any affliction, through the comfort with which we ourselves are comforted by God.

고린도후서 1:5.content: For as the sufferings of Christ abound to us, even so our comfort also abounds through Christ.

고린도후서 1:6.content: But if we are afflicted, it is for your comfort and salvation. If we are comforted, it is for your comfort, which produces in you the patient enduring of the same sufferings which we also suffer.

고린도후서 1:7.content: Our hope for you is steadfast, knowing that, since you are partakers of the sufferings, so you are also of the comfort.

고린도후서 1:8.content: For we don’t desire to have you uninformed, brothers, concerning our affliction which happened to us in Asia, that we were weighed down exceedingly, beyond our power, so much that we despaired even of life.

고린도후서 1:9.content: Yes, we ourselves have had the sentence of death within ourselves, that we should not trust in ourselves, but in God who raises the dead,

고린도후서 1:10.content: who delivered us out of so great a death, and does deliver; on whom we have set our hope that he will also still deliver us;

고린도후서 1:11.content: you also helping together on our behalf by your supplication; that, for the gift given to us by means of many, thanks may be given by many persons on your behalf.

고린도후서 1:12.content: For our boasting is this: the testimony of our conscience, that in holiness and sincerity of God, not in fleshly wisdom but in the grace of God we behaved ourselves in the world, and more abundantly toward you.

고린도후서 1:13.content: For we write no other things to you than what you read or even acknowledge, and I hope you will acknowledge to the end,

고린도후서 1:14.content: as also you acknowledged us in part, that we are your boasting, even as you also are ours, in the day of our Lord Jesus.

고린도후서 1:15.content: In this confidence, I was determined to come first to you, that you might have a second benefit,

고린도후서 1:16.content: and by you to pass into Macedonia, and again from Macedonia to come to you, and to be sent forward by you on my journey to Judea.

고린도후서 1:17.content: When I therefore was thus determined, did I show fickleness? Or the things that I purpose, do I purpose according to the flesh, that with me there should be the “Yes, yes” and the “No, no?”

고린도후서 1:18.content: But as God is faithful, our word toward you was not “Yes and no.”

고린도후서 1:19.content: For the Son of God, Jesus Christ, who was preached among you by us, by me, Silvanus, and Timothy, was not “Yes and no,” but in him is “Yes.”

고린도후서 1:20.content: For however many are the promises of God, in him is the “Yes.” Therefore also through him is the “Amen”, to the glory of God through us.

고린도후서 1:21.content: Now he who establishes us with you in Christ and anointed us is God,

고린도후서 1:22.content: who also sealed us, and gave us the down payment of the Spirit in our hearts.

고린도후서 1:23.content: But I call God for a witness to my soul, that I didn’t come to Corinth to spare you.

고린도후서 1:24.content: We don’t control your faith, but are fellow workers with you for your joy. For you stand firm in faith.
